Hardware Component File

N_PB1D_TCU_V3.0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference N_PB1D_TCU_V3.0_20180321T095145.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 7CA
Receive ID 7DA
Functional Addr 77
Functional Name DCM Nissan

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "1",
    "supplier": "284",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0001"
  }
]
